author: lustsazeus-lab
title: do_run_batches god-function + callback injection
notes: Claims are technically accurate: do_run_batches (execution.py:391) is ~355 lines with 15 _fn callback parameters, and orchestrator.py:181 has a wrapper of the same name. However, this is a clear duplicate of multiple earlier submissions: S023 (@jasonsutter87, 2026-03-05T00:43:52Z) identified the same god-function with identical line counts and parameter counts; S030 (@samquill) specifically called out the 15 raw callbacks vs Deps dataclass; S076 (@doncarbon) covered callback-parameter explosion; S182 (@MacHatter1) called out parameter bloat. S239 was submitted 2026-03-06T12:35:43Z, over 35 hours after S023. No novel angle or deeper analysis beyond what prior submissions already covered.
